text:
The Oregon Ducks track and field program is sending yet another talented star on to the Olympics. This time, it芒聙聶s Jaida Ross who will be representing the Ducks, the state of Oregon, and the United States during the upcoming 2024 Paris Olympics.脗

Ross, who is from Medford, Oregon, clinched a spot on Team USA by clinching third place in the shot put event at the U.S. Olympic Team Trials held at Hayward Field in Eugene on Saturday, June 29.脗

Given that this happened in her home state and at her university, this has to be a pretty big deal for Ross. It seems like she feels that it is.

From Medf冒聺聬聨rd, 冒聺聬聨reg冒聺聬聨n to the 冒聺聬聨lympics芒聙录茂赂聫冒聼楼聣 Jaida Ross冒聼聯聫 19.60m/64-3.75#GoDucksx#TrackFieldTrials24https://t.co/ftP6SjQl7j

"I feel on top of the world," Ross said,according to Oregon芒聙聶s press release. "I've never felt like this before芒聙娄feeling super grateful. (Hayward) was ecstatic. I've never heard it that loud. To have that many people here, it was amazing. Big shout out to the fans and anyone that came to watch."

Given the smile you can see on her face, it芒聙聶s more than safe to say that this is a phenomenal moment for her:

Jaida Ross on making the Olympic Team!#GoDuckspic.twitter.com/dJToDa0B4f

Competing alongside Ross in the shot put will be Chase Jackson and Raven Saunders, who are both also set to represent Team USA during the Paris Olympics.脗

Our women芒聙聶s shot put trio heading to Paris is TOUGH 冒聼聮陋冒聼楼聡 Chase Jackson | 20.10m冒聼楼聢 Raven Saunders | 19.90m冒聼楼聣 Jaida Ross | 19.60m#TrackTown24x#TrackFieldTrials24pic.twitter.com/fBLE5zpbiM

After Ross made it on to Team USA, Oregon Ducks fans were more than happy to celebrate the accomplishment of another Duck.

Unreal!!! outstanding !!! 冒聼聭聫冒聼聭聫冒聼娄聠冒聼聶聫

We will be cheering loud for our Ducks in Paris 冒聼聡芦冒聼聡路冒聼娄聠

Okay, the French Ducks have the perfect opportunity to celebrate Ross and her accomplishments. That芒聙聶s just great, to be completely honest.

Sco冒聼娄聠冒聼聮陋冒聼聫禄

SCOOOOOOOOOO

Thank you for taking a picture with me. I always knew you would do great things!! Girl power!!@GoDuckspic.twitter.com/ohCRkB19fK

This picture? Also great. We need more pictures of folks celebrating at Hayward Field.

As Oregon Ducks fans (and folks throughout Oregon) celebrate this incredible achievement, all eyes will turn to Paris for the 2024 Olympics. Duck fans (literally) around the globe will have the chance to cheer Ross on. And apparently some Duck fans in Paris will be there rooting for her as well.

title: Oregon Ducks track and field star Jaida Ross is headed to 2024 Paris Olympics
description: As Jaida Ross goes on to the 2024 Paris Olympics, Oregon Ducks fans are more than happy to celebrate all she's accomplished.
